title: callicarpa kinabaluensis
intro: Callicarpa kinabaluensis, also known as the Borneo purple callicarpa or velvet berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa kinabaluensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are often used to treat various health issues.
